versions.installHtml: # Configured by default in k0rdent managed clusters (AWS, AZURE, OpenStack, vSphere)
versions.verifyHtml:
Here is how to check CNI configuration in managed AWS cluster: 

kubectl get awscluster -A -n kcm-system -o yaml | grep cni -A 3
Expected output: 
cni:
    cniIngressRules:
    - description: bgp (calico)
      fromPort: 179
      protocol: tcp
